newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Q1 2026 results (revenue $153M, +16% y/y; EPS $0.27, +50% y/y) and Q2 guidance (revenue $152-162M; EPS $0.28-0.32) were reported April 23, pre-window. Design-win momentum in precision/MEMS and capacitors continues, but no new June catalyst.

sources.label: Knowles Q1 2026 earnings call transcript (Motley Fool)

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent under-covered AI supply-chain lens: edge-voice/sensor and specialty-capacitor story stays a neglected component play. Q1 beat and Q2 guide pre-date the window; no new June catalyst. Prior up move already captured the adjusted-score gap -> hold.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Edge-AI device adoption; acoustic-sensor design wins; specialty capacitors
verdicts.primaryRisk: Speculative conviction; demand concentration and execution after a sharp run
verdicts.bull: Under-covered MEMS/acoustic and high-performance capacitor maker that gains as AI moves to edge devices.
verdicts.neutral: Strong recent results but speculative latent-node thesis; no fresh June data point.
verdicts.bear: +86% YTD prices in much of the edge-AI optionality; component demand can be lumpy.
